title: USDZ Package Format Contract

included: non-Zip64 ZIP end-of-central-directory and central-directory parsing
local file header validation for indexed entries
default layer selection from the first physical package entry
non-owning byte views into the already-opened outer package

model.UsdzArchiveIndex: Validated ordered ZIP/USDZ entries plus package diagnostics.
model.UsdzEntry: Normalized entry name, local-header offset, data offset, byte size, and compression/encryption flags.
model.PackageEntryByteView: A non-owning byte span into the opened outer package plus package and entry names for diagnostics.

output.entry: first physical package entry or MissingUsdzDefaultLayer diagnostic

output.view: PackageEntryByteView over the same outer package storage

laws: USDZ parsing consumes already-opened package bytes; it must not open files or extract entries to temporary paths
the archive must be a ZIP archive with uncompressed, unencrypted entries
each selected file's data offset must be 64-byte aligned
entry names must reject absolute paths, backslashes, empty path segments, dot segments, and drive-like prefixes
duplicate normalized entry names must be diagnosed before layer opening
opening a whole package selects the first physical file entry and must not scan later entries for a USD file
entry_byte_view must not copy the selected entry into an owned byte buffer when the outer package bytes are still available
this skill does not parse USDA text or USDC Crate contents

adapter_protocol.input: A JSON file containing one case with package-format ops and an opened_resource object.
adapter_protocol.output: A JSON object with ok, diagnostics, and results.
